name: v0.9.16
body:
v0.9.16 is a correctness and privacy release that fixes two 0.9.15 regressions which could silently empty your graph, closes a residual path/username leak in committed graph.json files, and lands a batch of extraction and reliability fixes — most driven by community reports.

## Notable Bug Fixes
- Nested `.gitignore`/`.graphifyignore` bare `*` patterns now scoped to their own subtree — no more zeroed corpus (#1873 / #1887 / #1885, thanks @Alwyn93)
- `graphify update` no longer refuses to overwrite when a nested broad ignore rule causes 0 nodes to be detected (#1880)
- Silently-dropped documents during semantic extraction are now reconciled and surfaced as warnings instead of lost (#1890)
- Incremental semantic-cache checkpoint no longer fails on sliced (oversized) documents (#1870)
- `--exclude` patterns now persist into `update`/`watch`/hook rebuilds, not just the initial scan (#1886)
- Python `module.function()` calls now correctly produce a `calls` edge in the graph (#1883)
- Semantic cache writes are scoped per-file — a mis-attributed `source_file` can no longer clobber another file's cache entry (#1757 / #1835, thanks @TPAteeq)
- Full `graphify update` no longer evicts LLM semantic edges for re-extracted documents (#1865 / #1868, thanks @xor-xe)
- ID collisions now resolve to a deterministic survivor with warnings only on real data loss (#1851 / #1852, thanks @bchan84x)
- `--cargo` now honors Cargo `package = "..."` dependency renames (#1858 / #1861, thanks @thejesh23)
- Watch mode debounces rapid saves so a burst of edits triggers one rebuild (#1840)
- Export to GraphML escapes control characters that previously broke Gephi import (#1844)
- `graphify explain` no longer truncates multi-paragraph rationale nodes (#1847)
- Windows long-path scans no longer error on paths over 260 chars (#1849)
- Progress bar no longer flickers to 0% on the final extraction batch (#1855)

## Security Fixes
- Closed residual absolute-path/username leaks for out-of-root reference targets (`.csproj`/`.sln`, bash `source`) and degenerate symbols (minified `$`, JSONC `"//"` key) in committed `graph.json` (#1899)

## Install
```
pip install --upgrade graphifyy
# or
uv tool install graphifyy@0.9.16
```
